changelog.changes: 新增 Phase 1.8 扩展 (README skill count/badge) + Phase 1.14 (Forgejo config) 测试用例 2 个, 对应 v1.14.0
新增 Phase 1.12 (sync detection) + Phase 1.13 (issue awareness) 测试用例 3 个, 对应 state-scanner v2.9.0

evals.name: basic-state-collection
expectations: Output should include Git status information
Should provide workflow recommendation
Output should use structured format with sections

evals.name: user-options-display
evals.prompt: 查看项目状态，给我可选操作
expectations: Should show numbered options for user selection
Should mention custom input option

evals.name: readme-sync-detection
evals.prompt: 检查项目状态，特别注意文档版本是否一致
expectations: Should check README.md version against VERSION file or plugin.json
Should mention CHANGELOG date as reference source for date sync
Should output readme_status section

evals.name: config-awareness
evals.prompt: 扫描项目状态，这个项目有 .aria/config.json 配置吗？
expectations: Should mention .aria/config.json or config-loader
Should describe config fields like auto_proceed or confidence_threshold
Should mention default values when config is absent

evals.name: submodule-sync-detection-new
evals.prompt: 我在一个有 3 个 git 子模块的项目中工作 (aria, standards, aria-orchestrator)。最近其他协作者推送了 submodule 更新到远程。我想运行状态扫描了解当前本地代码是否和远程同步，特别是子模块是否落后远程。请扫描并告诉我是否需要 git submodule update。
expectations: Should output a sync_status section (🔄 同步状态 or equivalent) listing each submodule
Should check submodule tree_commit vs head_commit vs remote_commit with graceful fallback
Should detect submodule drift when tree_vs_remote is true and recommend git submodule update --remote
Should NOT execute git fetch without user consent (read FETCH_HEAD age instead)
Should gracefully handle missing origin/HEAD via four-tier fallback (origin_HEAD -> ls-remote -> config_default -> unavailable)
Should fail-soft on any git error, never blocking the rest of the scan

evals.name: upstream-behind-detection-new
evals.prompt: 我的 feature 分支已经开发几天了，怀疑主分支已经有新的改动我没拉下来。请扫描状态告诉我当前分支是否落后 upstream，并提示我是否需要 git pull。注意项目可能有 detached HEAD 或 shallow clone 场景需要处理。
expectations: Should detect upstream configuration via git rev-parse @{u} before calling rev-list --count
Should report current_branch.ahead and current_branch.behind when upstream exists
Should handle missing upstream with reason: no_upstream, not exit with error
Should handle detached HEAD with reason: detached_head
Should handle shallow clone via --is-shallow-repository AND fallback .git/shallow for older git
Should recommend git pull when behind >= 5 commits (branch_behind_upstream rule)

evals.name: issue-awareness-opt-in-new
evals.prompt: 我用 Aria 管理一个 Forgejo 上的项目，最近积累了一些 open issues 不知道哪些是阻塞性的。我想在开发新 feature 前先扫描项目状态同时了解 open issues。我的 .aria/config.json 中 state_scanner.issue_scan.enabled 设置为 true，platform 是 forgejo。请扫描并展示 issues。
expectations: Should show an Open Issues section only when issue_scan.enabled is true
Should detect platform using 4-tier priority (config.platform -> hostname map -> URL inference -> fallback)

Should call forgejo CLI wrapper (not raw curl) and handle 10 fetch_error enum values (network_unavailable, cli_missing, auth_missing, auth_failed, rate_limited, not_found_or_no_access, timeout, platform_unknown, parse_error, unknown)
Should use cache with 15-minute TTL at .aria/cache/issues.json
Should NOT manage API tokens inside the skill (rely on existing CLI wrapper auth)
Should attempt heuristic linking of issues to US-NNN patterns and OpenSpec change names (with word boundary protection against URL paths)
Should recommend triage when blocker/critical labeled issues exist (open_blocker_issues rule)
Should fail-soft and gracefully degrade when offline (network_unavailable) or CLI missing

evals.name: readme-skill-count-badge-check
evals.prompt: 我刚发布了 aria-plugin v1.14.0，新增了 3 个 Skill。我怀疑 aria/README.md 中的 Skill 数量和列表没更新，主项目 README 的 badge 版本也可能还是旧的。请扫描项目状态，特别检查 README 中的 Skill 数量是否与实际目录一致、Skill 列表是否完整、plugin badge 版本是否与 plugin.json 一致。
expectations: Should check aria/README.md version against aria/.claude-plugin/plugin.json
Should count Skills in aria/skills/ directory excluding user-invocable: false (internal Skills like config-loader, agent-router, agent-team-audit, arch-common, audit-engine)
Should compare Skill count with the number stated in README
Should check Skill list completeness by comparing directory names with README Skills listing
Should output skill_list_missing items at info severity level (not warning)
Should check Plugin badge version in root README against plugin.json version
Should report badge mismatch as warning severity
Should gracefully handle missing aria submodule (skip, not error)

evals.name: forgejo-config-detection
evals.prompt: 我在一个使用 Forgejo (forgejo.10cg.pub) 作为 Git 平台的项目中工作。我还没有创建 CLAUDE.local.md 来配置 Forgejo API 访问。请扫描项目状态，告诉我是否有遗漏的配置，以及如何设置 Forgejo 集成。
expectations: Should detect Forgejo remote by checking git remote URLs for known instances (forgejo.10cg.pub)
Should check for existence of CLAUDE.local.md file
Should check if CLAUDE.local.md contains forgejo: configuration block when file exists
Should output forgejo_config section with config_status (missing/incomplete/configured)
Should suggest running /forgejo-sync to create configuration when missing
Should NOT auto-create CLAUDE.local.md during state-scanner scan (read-only)
Should skip Forgejo detection when no Forgejo remote is configured (non-Forgejo projects)
